key_findings: Allow rate: 70.0% (14/20) vs v1.11-D 86.7% (13/15) — Δ-16.7%. Small batches produce a more realistic distribution because multi_asset_sync does not fire in 0/5 scenarios.

Observe layer ACTIVATED: 15.0% (3/20). v1.11-D had 0% observe — the large batch inflated multi_asset_sync and suppressed observe. Small batches correctly route incomplete signals to observe. Observe triggered in 2/5 batches.

Multi_asset_sync: fired in 5/5 batches (requires >= 3 real same-direction assets). In the remaining 0 batches, only 2 or fewer real assets shared direction — multi_asset_sync could not fire. This is the CORRECT behavior for small batches.

Cooldown: 1 same-asset repeat scenario(s) detected. SignalValueGate correctly allows both occurrences (no cooldown logic in gate by design). This CONFIRMS cooldown must be a separate layer in pre_send_gate or a dedicated cooldown module.
Pre-send gate readiness: NOT READY. Blockers: 1. Conditions: 2.

blockers: Cooldown not implemented — same-asset repeats would flood test channel. Implement cooldown layer before pre_send_gate.
conditions: Observe layer fires correctly in small batches — gate is discriminating enough to be useful as a pre-filter.
Complete v1.11-E validation with real-time data before deciding.

scenarios.objective: Verify that 3 well-confirmed signals all pass as allow. Tests multi_asset_sync at the exact threshold (3 real assets). This is the expected normal-operation baseline.

multi_asset_sync_analysis.note: Small batch (3 real, 3 in dominant direction): multi_asset_sync FIRES (threshold is >= 3 real assets). Multi fires but is backed by OI/volume in most signals.

scenarios.objective: Demonstrate that SignalValueGate correctly evaluates each signal independently but cannot detect same-asset repeats. ARB appears twice — both will pass the gate. This proves cooldown must be a separate layer (pre_send_gate or cooldown module), not inside SignalValueGate.

multi_asset_sync_analysis.note: Small batch (5 real, 5 in dominant direction): multi_asset_sync FIRES (threshold is >= 3 real assets). Multi fires but is backed by OI/volume in most signals.

cooldown_findings.recommendation: ARB triggered 2 times within batch. Gate allowed all occurrences (no cooldown logic in gate). Recommend: implement in pre_send_gate or cooldown layer — first occurrence passes, subsequent within 10–30 min cooldown window are suppressed unless value_score increases significantly.
